'''IT-3 Interrogators''' were state-of-the-art [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droids]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were stationed at the headquarters of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. They succeeded the [[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|IT-O Interrogator]] in the line.<ref name="NEGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>
